title: Savory Velvety Filipino Sun Dried Tomatoes Pancit Bihon
description: A savory and velvety Filipino dish featuring sun-dried tomatoes, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This gluten-free friendly pancit bihon recipe is made with double-rise bread and has a bitter flavor profile.

ingredients.name: sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.notes: packed in oil, drained and chopped

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cubed bread and cook until lightly toasted.
Add the rice flour and stir to combine.
Add the patis and salt, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
